snippet.title: Apprenticeship Opportunities with Zurich Insurance
snippet.description:
Insurance is so much more than you think! As well as apprenticeships covering claims and underwriting, @Zurich.Insurance also has opportunities in careers you might not expect from a leading insurance company, such as Data Science, Operations & IT and Marketing, plus more. These range from Level 3 apprenticeships right up to Level 6-degree apprenticeships. There's something to suit everyone!

Watch this webinar to hear directly from the team at Zurich Insurance and hear from current apprentices about how you can start your career journey. 

Head over to our website for the latest apprenticeship opportunities and to sign up for future webinars: www.successatschool.org

snippet.title: Sind Cyberangriffe in Zukunft "unversicherbar"? - der Clouddoktor fragt 🤔
snippet.description:
Mario Greco (CEO der Zurich Versicherungsgruppe) sagt, Cyberangriffe werden "unversicherbar". Er verweist auf unkalkulierbare Risiken durch die Vernetzung der Wirtschaft. 

Was bedeutet das für die #ITSicherheit eines typischen mittelständischen Unternehmens?

❌ Anzahl der Cyberangriffe nimmt weiter zu
❌ Kriminelle greifen dort an, wo sie mit geringstem Aufwand am meisten Lösegeld erpressen können
❌ Cyberversicherungen werden teurer, sofern sie überhaupt dauerhaft angeboten werden

✔️ Schützen Sie Ihre IT, so dass die Kriminellen sich andere - einfacher erfolgreich anzugreifende - Unternehmen als Opfer suchen
✔️ IT-Sicherheit bedeutet heutzutage mehr als "Firewall" und "Virenschutz" - fragen sie ihren IT-Dienstleister nach "Managed Detection & Response" bzw. einem "externen SOC"
✔️ Investieren sie nicht nur in Technik, sondern auch in die Sensibilisierung ihrer Mitarbeiter (und zwar aller ihrer Mitarbeiter, nicht nur derer in ihrer IT-Abteilung) zur Erkennung von Gefahren

Link zum Artikel der Financial Times
https://www.ft.com/content/63ea94fa-c6fc-449f-b2b8-ea29cc83637d

snippet.title: My Italian husband’s REAL DNA results! 😅😂 #shorts
snippet.description:
Why would I take the AncestryDNA test?
AncestryDNA is a cutting edge DNA testing service that utilizes some of the latest autosomal testing technology, our patented Genetic Communities technology, and the largest consumer DNA database to revolutionize the way you discover your family history. This service combines advanced DNA science with the world's largest online family history resource to estimate your genetic ethnicity and help you find new family connections. It maps ethnicity going back multiple generations and provides insight into such possibilities as what region of Europe your ancestors came from or whether you're likely to have Southeast Asian heritage. AncestryDNA can also help identify relationships with unknown relatives through a dynamic list of DNA matches.

snippet.title: Becoming Fluent in German and Dutch: Polyglot Gathering 2023 🇮🇹🇩🇪🇳🇱 Interview with Mario from Italy
snippet.description:
👉Link to my free course in English and Spanish /👉Enlace a mi curso gratuito en español e inglés: https://translationcubed.thinkific.com/courses/free-30-day-german-course
✅For more tips on how to learn German and other languages faster, follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/linguathor_fluency/

🌍🗣️ Join us in this interview at the 2023 Polyglot Gathering (https://www.polyglotgathering.com/2023/) where I catch up with Mario, an Italian polyglot fluent in multiple languages, and Mario shares his passion for languages and explains how he became proficient in German and Dutch. 

🇩🇪 From an early age, Mario was fascinated by the German language's sound, writing, and overall structure, so he chose to study it in school. Mario's dedication and love for the language led him to excel in German, and he even studied in Japan, further expanding his language skills. 

🇳🇱 Mario also shares his experiences living in the Netherlands and how he learned Dutch, initially encountering some challenges with the language. However, through practice and immersion, he gradually became proficient. 🎥🎧🗣️ Like myself, Mario recommends watching movies, listening to music, and engaging with native speakers to learn languages. Lastly, he emphasizes the importance of PERSISTENCE 💪📈🚀 and ENJOYING 😄 the process of learning a language.  

🤓 If you're interested in my personal experience learning Dutch, check out my video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z9aFo5cICes (What does Dutch sound like? - video in Dutch w/English subtitles)

😁✌️ Mario is also one of the wonderful hosts of Easy Dutch https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SYZPcQXyiuM and you can find him on Instagram here https://www.instagram.com/mario.tedesco.m/

snippet.title: (NEW) Interview with Aegean Macedonian-Decata Begalci
snippet.description:
What does an Aegean Macedonian have to say about her identity, and what she experienced at the hands of the Greek government?

In today's episode of #MariosHistoryTalks, we sit down and interview Olga, an Aegean Macedonian whose experiences as part of the Decata Begalci took her from her native Macedonia to camps in Poland, to Canada and finally America.

We also ask her perspective on lot of the controversial issues facing Macedonia and Greece today!

snippet.title: Is my insurance approved by the Central Bank of the UAE?
snippet.description:
When you’re buying life insurance, it’s important to take a moment to ask the right questions. All insurance companies in the UAE should be approved and regulated by the Central Bank Of UAE (CBUAE), who ensure industry best practices and offer you complete transparency – to protect you from policy-related disputes or insurance frauds. Your first question to your financial broker or advisor should always be, “Is my insurance policy approved by the CBUAE?”

#approvedbyCBUAE #readyforlife #zurichmiddleeast

snippet.title: Meet Taku from Zurich Insurance UK 😃 #shorts
snippet.description:
Meet Taku from Zurich Insurance UK 😃 #shorts

In this short, we interview Taku from Zurich Insurance (UK).

Learn more about the Grad Scheme: https://www.zurich.co.uk/careers/graduate-schemes

The Graduate Development Programme at Zurich is designed to equip graduates with a strong foundation of workplace knowledge and skills, alongside opportunities to put those skills into practice in real-time. Zurich aims to provide a supportive and enriching learning experience, through which graduates can grow, explore, and identify where they can excel personally and professionally, thereby adding significant value to the company. The delivery of the Graduate Development Programme's events, workshops, and activities at Zurich varies depending on the content and the session objectives. Sessions may be delivered virtually by either internal experts or external facilitators, through e-Learning, or with face-to-face workshops in small groups or with all the graduates from their cohort.

Applicants must decide on their single choice of graduate programme when they submit their application, so it is advised that they take time to ensure they have chosen the one that is right for them. More information about each of the schemes is available below, and prospective applicants can hear from some of Zurich's graduates about their own personal experiences.

#careermap #careers #interview #insurance #zurich

Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages the continent’s two premier men’s basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sport’s premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament.

The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational activities, led by the One Team program, in alignment with the United Nations Agenda 2030 Sustainable Development Goals. On the academic side, the EB Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management.

About One Team
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program , supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration" that actively addresses targets of the United Nations Sustainable Development Goal 10 on Reduced Inequalities. Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 23,000 participants through its various team projects.

snippet.title: Strage di Erba, EPISODIO 1 - Gli audio shock: "Ecco la verità sul riconoscimento di Mario Frigerio"
snippet.description:
INFO SU QUESTO PODCAST: 

Il podcast IL GRANDE ABBAGLIO prende il nome dall’omonimo libro che pubblicammo nel 2008, in cui si sosteneva l’innocenza di Olindo Romano e Rosa Bazzi. Il volume fu travolto dalle polemiche e venne attaccato direttamente in aula dal pubblico ministero di Como Massimo Astori. 
Dopo aver raccontato per anni alla trasmissione Le Iene le nostre scoperte, abbiamo deciso di svelare qui i documenti e gli atti mai entrati a processo. 

Gli autori:
Edoardo Montolli
Felice Manti

***

IN QUESTA PUNTATA:

In questa puntata Felice Manti e Edoardo Montolli gli autori del libro IL GRANDE ABBAGLIO – CONTROINCHIESTA SULLA STRAGE DI ERBA, continuano a raccontare gli elementi mai emersi a processo che hanno scoperto negli anni e che sono alla base di buona parte della richiesta di revisione per Olindo Romano e Rosa Bazzi.

Gli autori fanno ascoltare per la prima volta in maniera completa tutti gli audio mai entrati a processo nei quali il testimone della strage, dopo aver in teoria già riconosciuto Olindo Romano come suo aggressore, non ricordava assolutamente nulla dell’accaduto.

Viene per la prima volta fatto sentire anche l’audio di un’intervista realizzata nel novembre 2007 da Felice Manti con l’avvocato Manuel Gabrielli, legale di Frigerio, nel quale Gabrielli sosteneva di avere “timori” per come il suo assistito aveva cambiato versione dei fatti: tale audio sarà utilizzato dalla difesa di Rosa e Olindo nella richiesta di revisione del processo.

Soprattutto, a proposito delle nuove prove utili alla revisione, viene per la prima volta illustrata la perizia del professor Giuseppe Sartori, ordinario di neuropsicologia all’università di Padova, secondo la quale Mario Frigerio non avrebbe riconosciuto Olindo nemmeno il 26 dicembre 2006 davanti ai pm: la frase che avrebbe detto loro non sarebbe infatti “subito l’Olindo”, ma “subito l’ho visto”. 
«Se questo fatto fosse accertato – spiega Montolli nel podcast –, significherebbe ovviamente che il riconoscimento di Olindo Romano da parte di Mario Frigerio avvenne nei giorni successivi, quando però le intercettazioni del testimone spariscono misteriosamente nel nulla, dalle 11,49 del 28 dicembe alle 9,55 del 3 gennaio. Se questo fatto fosse accertato, vorrebbe dire che il ricordo di Frigerio mutò da una persona sconosciuta, alta e olivastra al notissimo vicino di casa, basso e bianco proprio nel momento in cui nulla possiamo sapere di ciò che accadde intorno al testimone». 

***
Se volete abbonarvi e sostenere il nostro canale e il nostro lavoro, potete farlo qui: https://www.youtube.com/@Frontedelblog/join

***

E' uscito il nuovo libro di Felice Manti e Edoardo Montolli:

su Amazon, qui:
https://amzn.to/498S1Io

***

snippet.title: Giuseppe Guagliardo 2022 demo Fortea & HVL www concert classical guitar com
snippet.description:
Giuseppe Guagliardo 2022 demo Fortea & HVL  www concert classical guitar com

It is not that often that we are listing a traditional braced guitar. However, here is a great guitar from Italy made by Giuseppe Guagliardo. It is a traditional braced guitar made in the pure traditional tradition. The guitar is loud enough to perform a concert and is offering a sweet sound with a huge string separation and thick and balance between brightness and warmness. The sound is crystal clear and the playability is amazing. We receive many traditional guitars and select rarely one of them because of the tough competition of double tops and lattice. Here is a pure traditional sound that we really like.

snippet.title: Entrevista Batlleiroig | Foro Contract | BARCELONA
snippet.description:
Entrevista realizada a Josep Batlle Blay del estudio Batlleiroig durante el evento Foro Contract Barcelona de Arquitectura y Empresa, Diciembre 2022

Món Sant Benet

De los 40 estudios de arquitectura e interiorismo invitados, asistieron al evento: GCA Architects, C63_Studio Espinet+Ubach, SPG Arquitectura, Batlleiroig, ABAA Arquitectura, RQP Arquitectura, Mesura, Ruiz-Larrea Arquitectura, Sulkin-Marchissio SCP Arquitectes, Mestura Arquitectes, BCQ Arquitectura Barcelona, Benedetta Tagliabue – EMBT Architects, Anna & Eugeni Bach / Bach arquitectes, Arriola & Fiol urban civic projects, Exitprojectes, ON-A, B/TA Arquitectura, BXD Arquitectura, HAZ Arquitectura, Estudio Vilablanch, Simbiosi Estudi, Gallego Arquitectura, Casellas Architects, Marta Castellano Estudi, Aramé Studio, BAX Studio, Built, CRÜ Studio, OMA Octavio Mestre Arquitectos, Murad García Estudio, Binarq Arquitectos, Lagula Arquitectes, Labaula Arquitectes, Elastiko architects, Roel Sánchez Arquitectura y Serrat-Tort Arquitectes. 

Participaron en la jornada las siguientes 35 empresas: Simon, Soler & Palau, Grupo Puma, Look Composites, Pladur, Serge Ferrari, Cuerpos Huecos Estructurales, Grupo Greco Gres, Geolam, Equitone, Maora Ceramic, Niessen, Innovus, Bowers&Wilkins, Geberit, Essepi, Bandalux, Interface, THU Ceiling Solutions, Lafarge Holcim, Fama Solutions, Pal Plastic, Ramon Soler, Astro Lighting, NewTechWood, ChovA, FSB, Gradhermetic, Accoya Grupo Gámiz ,Berry Alloc, Gabelex, Bona, Keraben Grupo, Kömmerling y Arc.316.
